prompt: Go 서비스에서 context.WithTimeout 필수로 쓰라는 규칙 추가해줘. 타임아웃 없이 gRPC 콜하면 안 돼.

assertions.text: CLAUDE.md is not modified (or only trivially changed)
New rule uses positive framing ('use context.WithTimeout' not 'don't call without timeout')
New rule is placed under appropriate severity tier (MANDATORY or CRITICAL)
